creator: cal@rivio.com
text:
When booting fbsd 4.2 on my Dell Inspiron 3800 (cardbus) system, if there is any card in either cardbus slot, the system hard locks when it would init the card.  If i do an install from cd with no card in and insert a card, the system immediatly locks up.  This has happened on 3 dell 3800's with 6 or 7 different cards.

Fix: 

no fix
How-To-Repeat: read above
